headline: Carrier Ventures Invests in Heat Geek to Accelerate Heat Pump Adoption Across Europe
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, today announced that its venture group, Carrier Ventures, has made a strategic investment in Heat Geek, a UK-based startup helping accelerate residential heat pump adoption across Europe.

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".
